paper_metadata.title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization
paper_metadata.abstract: Large-scale pre-trained sequence-to-sequence models like BART and T5 achieve state-of-the-art performance on many generative NLP tasks. However, such models pose a great challenge in resource-constrained scenarios owing to their large memory requirements and high latency. To alleviate this issue, we propose to jointly distill and quantize the model, where knowledge is transferred from the full-precision teacher model to the quantized and distilled low-precision student model. Empirical analyses show that, despite the challenging nature of generative tasks, we were able to achieve a 16.5x model footprint compression ratio with little performance drop relative to the full-precision counterparts on multiple summarization and QA datasets. We further pushed the limit of compression ratio to 27.7x and presented the performance-efficiency trade-off for generative tasks using pre-trained models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work aiming to effectively distill and quantize sequence-to-sequence pre-trained models for language generation tasks.

extraction_data.innovation: Joint distillation and quantization framework that transfers knowledge from a full-precision teacher model (BART) to a quantized and distilled low-precision student model, achieving significant model footprint compression (16.5x to 27.7x) with minimal performance loss on generative tasks like summarization and question answering.
extraction_data.extension: Approximation-based symmetric linear quantization for weights and 8-bit quantization for activations, combined with layer-wise distillation of logits, attention scores, and hidden states from a full-precision teacher model.
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient compression of large pre-trained sequence-to-sequence models for deployment in resource-constrained scenarios
extraction_data.application: Text summarization, machine translation, natural language generation
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

extraction_data.innovation: Joint distillation and quantization of BART to achieve significant model compression (up to 16.5x) with minimal performance drop on generative tasks. This is the first work to apply joint quantization and distillation on pretrained seq2seq language models.
extraction_data.application: Text summarization (CNN/DM, XSUM), long-form question answering (ELI5), machine translation (WMT16 En-Ro)
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient sequence-to-sequence modeling for resource-constrained scenarios
extraction_data.extension: Combines distillation-aware quantization with layer reduction in the decoder to achieve higher compression ratios without significant performance degradation.
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

extraction_data.innovation: Distillation-only variant of BART for comparison with joint distillation and quantization, demonstrating the added value of quantization in model compression.
extraction_data.application: Text summarization (CNN/DM, XSUM), long-form question answering (ELI5), machine translation (WMT16 En-Ro)
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient sequence-to-sequence modeling for resource-constrained scenarios
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

extraction_data.innovation: Quantized variant of DQ-BART with specific bit-width configurations for encoder, decoder, and embeddings to optimize model footprint.
extraction_data.application: Text summarization, question answering, machine translation
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient sequence-to-sequence modeling via model compression
extraction_data.extension: Quantization-aware training with 8-bit encoder, 8-bit decoder, and 8/6-bit embeddings for efficient inference.
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

extraction_data.innovation: Quantized variant of DQ-BART with aggressive bit-width reduction for encoder and decoder layers to further compress model size.
extraction_data.application: Text summarization, question answering, machine translation
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient sequence-to-sequence modeling via model compression
extraction_data.extension: Quantization-aware training with 2-bit encoder, 2-bit decoder, and 8/6-bit embeddings for ultra-efficient inference.
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

extraction_data.innovation: Quantized variant of DQ-BART with balanced bit-width configurations for encoder, decoder, and embeddings to optimize performance and footprint trade-off.
extraction_data.application: Text summarization, question answering, machine translation
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient sequence-to-sequence modeling via model compression
extraction_data.extension: Quantization-aware training with 8-bit encoder, 8-bit decoder, and 8/6-bit embeddings for efficient inference.
extraction_data.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization
